text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Have you all put your luggage in your rooms?
Okay then, now to review our itinerary for
summer camp—

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I have a plan! I have a plan!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text: Yes, Turbo?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: I wanna smash watermelons!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you. Shouldn't we be focusing on training
first?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
Nature is right. First, we will be tackling this
training regimen I put together.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
However, watermelons are rich in water, minerals,
vitamins, and sugar content, making them good
for preventing heatstroke.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
So, I'll make use of your suggestion. We'll eat
some watermelon during our breaks.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
All right. I figured you would say something like
that.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Splitting watermelons... One time, I tripped and fell into a sand pit. I landed flat on my face, and my nose got all bloody. Sigh...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
In that case, you have to nosebleed-proof
yourself before the next time you fall over!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
You can put an inner tube around your face!
Problem solved! I'm such a genius!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
What?! You want me to split watermelons wearing
an inner tube around my face?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hm... Well, I guess it would protect me when
falling over...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You're going to worry yourself sick. I'll keep
watch so you don't trip and fall.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But more importantly... how about giving Ikuno some suggestions for our training plans?

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
...Give me a second. I'm adjusting our schedule to
make room for watermelon splitting.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
I know! Let's play some beach volleyball! And
then we can have a barbecue and go to a festival!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Yeah, that'd be... Wait, that's all fun and games!

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
As long as we complete our training as planned,
that shouldn't be a problem.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
In fact, within reason, I'd say it works to keep us
from burning out. It may do us some good to see
the fireworks, too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...It looks like Ikuno's getting a little giddy
herself.
